user_question: Which customers left 5-star reviews and spent over 500?
generated_sql:
SELECT
    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_unique_id,
    ROUND(SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value)::numeric, 2) AS total_spent_on_5_star_orders
FROM
    customers c
JOIN
    orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN
    order_reviews r ON o.order_id = r.order_id
JOIN
    order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE
    r.review_score = 5
GROUP BY
    c.customer_id,
    c.customer_unique_id
HAVING
    SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value) > 500
LIMIT 100;
SELECT COUNT(*) as customer_count FROM customers;
